scores.notes: Text accuracy is good with one minor error ('EUA' instead of 'GER' or 'FRG' for Germany, assuming a standard abbreviation). Table structure has issues with the last two rows being misaligned and missing a rank number. Numeric precision is high, with only one dash instead of a zero. Layout preservation is decent, but the last two entries are not aligned with the rest of the table. Completeness is good, with only the missing rank numbers and the dash being minor omissions.
